chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 513 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Fresh case. 1. For order on Misc. No. 2574/2026 (U/A) 2. For order on office objection No. 1 to 4. 3. For order on Misc. No. 2575/2026 (Exp/A) 4. For order on Misc. No. 2576/2026 (Stay/A) 5. For hearing of main case. 06.02.2026 Mr. Khalid Saifullah, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. ---------- 1. Granted. 2-5. Learned counsel submits that this Petition is not being pressed as the Petitioner would avail remedy before the appropriate forum in accordance with law. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz
